0:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'EUR') * 1.0 /
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK'),
        2
    ) AS EUR_to_CZK_ratio;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
1:
SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM' 
  AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY SUM(ym.Consumption) ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
2:
SELECT AVG(Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth ym
INNER JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND LEFT(ym.Date, 4) = '2013';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
3:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ym.Consumption), 0) 
     FROM yearmonth ym
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212') 
    - 
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ym.Consumption), 0) 
     FROM yearmonth ym
     JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
     WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212') 
AS ConsumptionDifference;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
4:
SELECT SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
       SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM customers WHERE Currency = 'CZK')
GROUP BY Year
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
5:
SELECT y.Date, SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth y
JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY y.Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
6:
WITH lowest_consumption_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        c.CustomerID,
        c.Segment,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'CZK' 
      AND ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
segment_min_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total_consumption
    FROM lowest_consumption_customers
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME', 'LAM', 'KAM')
    GROUP BY Segment
),
lowest_customers AS (
    SELECT 
        lcc.Segment,
        lcc.CustomerID,
        lcc.total_consumption
    FROM lowest_consumption_customers lcc
    JOIN segment_min_consumption smc 
        ON lcc.Segment = smc.Segment 
        AND lcc.total_consumption = smc.min_total_consumption
),
annual_avg_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(total_consumption) / COUNT(CustomerID) AS annual_avg
    FROM lowest_customers
    GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT annual_avg FROM annual_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS diff_KAM_SME;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH consumption_by_segment_year AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
        SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM yearmonth ym
    JOIN customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR' 
        AND SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4) IN ('2012', '2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, SUBSTR(ym.Date, 1, 4)
),
pivot_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2012' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS Consumption_2012,
        MAX(CASE WHEN Year = '2013' THEN TotalConsumption END) AS Consumption_2013
    FROM consumption_by_segment_year
    GROUP BY Segment
),
percentage_change AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        Consumption_2012,
        Consumption_2013,
        (Consumption_2013 - Consumption_2012) AS Increase_Decrease,
        ((Consumption_2013 - Consumption_2012) / Consumption_2012) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
    FROM pivot_consumption
    WHERE Consumption_2012 IS NOT NULL AND Consumption_2013 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    PercentageIncrease
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY PercentageIncrease DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    Segment,
    PercentageIncrease
FROM percentage_change
ORDER BY PercentageIncrease ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
8:
SELECT SUM(Consumption) 
FROM yearmonth 
WHERE CustomerID = 6 
  AND Date BETWEEN '201308' AND '201311';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
9:
SELECT 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'CZE' AND Segment = 'Discount') - 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gasstations WHERE Country = 'SVK' AND Segment = 'Discount') AS difference;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
10:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 END)) AS Amount_of_more_SMEs
FROM customers c
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
11:
SELECT 
    (COUNT(CASE WHEN y.Consumption > 46.73 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS Percentage
FROM yearmonth y
INNER JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'LAM';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
12:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN y.Consumption > 528.3 THEN y.CustomerID END) * 100.0) / 
        COUNT(DISTINCT y.CustomerID), 
        2
    ) AS Percentage
FROM yearmonth y
WHERE y.Date LIKE '201202%';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
13:
SELECT MAX(Consumption) AS HighestMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth
WHERE SUBSTRING(Date, 1, 4) = '2012';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
14:
SELECT DISTINCT p.Description
FROM products p
JOIN transactions_1k t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID
WHERE SUBSTR(t.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' AND SUBSTR(t.Date, 6, 2) = '09';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

24:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN c.Currency = 'EUR' THEN t.CustomerID END) * 100.0 / 
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.CustomerID), 
        2
    ) AS Percentage_EUR_Customers
FROM transactions_1k t
INNER JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE DATE(t.Date) = '2012-08-25';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
25:
WITH customer_paid AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date = '2012-08-25' AND Price = 634.8
),
consumption_2012 AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2012
    FROM yearmonth y
    WHERE y.Date LIKE '2012%'
      AND y.CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM customer_paid)
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
),
consumption_2013 AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_2013
    FROM yearmonth y
    WHERE y.Date LIKE '2013%'
      AND y.CustomerID = (SELECT CustomerID FROM customer_paid)
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
)
SELECT 
    c12.CustomerID,
    (c12.total_2012 - c13.total_2013) / c12.total_2012 AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM consumption_2012 c12
JOIN consumption_2013 c13 ON c12.CustomerID = c13.CustomerID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
26:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN g.Segment = 'premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / 
        COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS premium_percentage
FROM gasstations g
WHERE g.Country = 'SVK';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
27:
SELECT 
    t.CustomerID,
    SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_amount_spent,
    SUM(CASE WHEN y.Date = '201201' THEN t.Amount * t.Price ELSE 0 END) AS january_2012_spent
FROM transactions_1k t
INNER JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
LEFT JOIN yearmonth y ON t.CustomerID = y.CustomerID AND y.Date = '201201'
WHERE t.CustomerID = 38508
GROUP BY t.CustomerID;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
28:
SELECT c.CustomerID,
       SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS average_price_per_item,
       c.Currency
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Price) DESC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
29:
SELECT y.CustomerID,
       CASE 
           WHEN y.Consumption IS NULL THEN 'No Data'
           WHEN y.Consumption > 0 THEN 'Has Consumption'
           ELSE 'No Consumption'
       END AS ConsumptionStatus
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT t.CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k t
    WHERE t.ProductID = 5 
      AND (t.Price / t.Amount) > 29.00
) AS filtered_customers
LEFT JOIN yearmonth y ON filtered_customers.CustomerID = y.CustomerID 
                     AND y.Date = '201208';	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Angela' AND mem.last_name = 'Sanders';	----- bird -----	student_club
31:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM member m
INNER JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
INNER JOIN event e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' AND m.t_shirt_size = 'Medium';	----- bird -----	student_club
32:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM event e
WHERE e.type = 'Meeting'
  AND e.event_id IN (
      SELECT link_to_event 
      FROM attendance 
      GROUP BY link_to_event 
      HAVING COUNT(link_to_member) > 10
  );	----- bird -----	student_club
33:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
INNER JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
WHERE e.type != 'fundraiser'
GROUP BY e.event_id, e.event_name
HAVING COUNT(a.link_to_member) > 20;	----- bird -----	student_club
34:
SELECT SUM(i.amount) 
FROM income i 
JOIN member m ON i.link_to_member = m.member_id 
WHERE m.position = 'Vice President';	----- bird -----	student_club
35:
SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name
FROM member m
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE z.state = 'Illinois';	----- bird -----	student_club
36:
SELECT 
    e.expense_description,
    CASE 
        WHEN e.approved = 'True' THEN 'Approved'
        ELSE 'Not Approved'
    END AS approval_status
FROM event ev
JOIN budget b ON ev.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense e ON b.budget_id = e.link_to_budget
WHERE ev.event_name = 'October Meeting' 
  AND ev.event_date = '2019-10-08'
  AND DATE(e.expense_date) = '2019-10-08';	----- bird -----	student_club
37:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(e.cost), 2) AS total_average_cost
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
WHERE CONCAT(m.first_name, ' ', m.last_name) = 'Elijah Allen'
AND (SUBSTR(e.expense_date, 6, 2) = '09' OR SUBSTR(e.expense_date, 6, 2) = '10');	----- bird -----	student_club
38:
SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2019' THEN b.spent END), 0) -
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) = '2020' THEN b.spent END), 0) AS difference_total_spent
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE SUBSTR(e.event_date, 1, 4) IN ('2019', '2020');	----- bird -----	student_club

FROM income
WHERE source = 'Fundraising' AND date_received = '2019-09-14';	----- bird -----	student_club
